blocks.text: Match preview: Karimnagar Diamonds face Palamuru Strikers in 27th Match (T20) on Tue, 7 Jul, 2026, 2:15 pm at Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium Hyderabad. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Balanced wicket; black soil offers turn as match progresses.
Drizzle · High 32°C / Low 25°C · Rain: 3.1 mm · Wind: up to 25 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
